name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I hope you watched tonight's debate
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
I just got off the debate stage, and I hope you had the chance to watch.
We talked about some of the big differences in this campaign: I support a $15 minimum wage, Secretary Clinton does not. I have a plan to achieve universal health care as a right for every man, woman and child in America, Secretary Clinton does not. I have been fighting to hold Wall Street accountable for their greed, recklessness and fraud, Secretary Clinton has been taking hundreds of thousands of dollars from Goldman Sachs for paid speeches.
In five days New York votes, and we are doing everything we can to win. If we continue to fight, and turnout is high, I think we will. And that's why I have to ask:
[**Can I count on you to make a $2.70 contribution right now? Thousands of supporters are responding to tonight 's debate with donations. With five days left before New York votes, it is so important that you add yours right now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-york-debate?refcode=em160414 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-york-debate?refcode=em160414")
This is the most important stretch of our campaign. We have won eight of the last nine caucuses and primaries, but the result in New York this Tuesday and the five states voting the week after will go a long way toward determining whether or not our political revolution wins this Democratic primary, the White House, and takes our country back from the billionaire class. That's why your contribution is so important.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-york-debate?refcode=em160414 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-york-debate?refcode=em160414")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: if I made you proud tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
Last big moment before New York votes | Friend --

I hope I made you proud in tonight's debate against Senator Sanders.

This was our last big moment before the New York primary, a contest we need to win big. Senator Sanders outraised us by $14 million in March and is currently outspending us on TV in New York -- but I believe that together, we can take him on.

**If you're with me, chip in tonight to get your free Team Hillary sticker. It's not about the money, it's about knowing that you're here and willing to fight for the future we believe in:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUyNDU0NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzM0NzcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUyNDU0NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzM0NzcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you. Together we're going to win the nomination, win the White House, and do amazing work for the millions of people counting on us to make their lives easier.

Hillary

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUyNDU0NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzM0NzcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUyNDU0NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzM0NzcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjUyNDU0NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzM0NzcyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjUyNDU0NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzM0NzcyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjUyNDU0NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzM0NzcyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUyNDU0NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzM0NzcyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUyNDU0NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzM0NzcyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjUyNDU0NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzM0NzcyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUyNDU0NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzM0NzcyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUyNDU0NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzM0NzcyS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUyNDU0NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzM0NzcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUyNDU0NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzM0NzcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: John Kasich
subject: Tied for second
body:
A new Fox News poll released last night shows major positive
movement in our direction. Support for our campaign has jumped
8-points just since last month while Senator Cruz has plummeted a
full 11-points.

Peter, a new Fox News poll
released last night shows major positive movement in our
direction. Support for our campaign has jumped 8-points just
since last month while Senator Cruz has plummeted a full
11-points. That means Senator Cruz and I are essentially tied for
second place.

As you can see, our positive
message is working as more people hear it.

It's critical that we continue
gathering delegates to stop Trump and head into the convention
with the wind at our backs!

The New York Primary is on
Tuesday, followed by five more primaries a week later.

Your contribution of $10 or more
before Sunday evening earns you a chance to receive one of five
signed copies of my best-selling book 'Every Other Monday'

Peter - Can you help us hit our
goal?

>> CHIP IN $25 <<

>> CHIP IN $50 <<

>> CHIP IN $100 <<

There have also now been 14 polls
in a row showing that if Republicans select me as their nominee,
I will defeat Hillary Clinton in the fall. Not only would she
crush Trump/Cruz, but they'd lose so bad it'd jeopardize our
majority in the U.S. Senate and in statewide elections around the
country!

Our positive message is working
and it's vital that we keep marching forward to the convention.
Thank you for your support!

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio & Presidential
Candidate
JohnKasich.com

P.S. In case you missed the CNN
Town Hall on Monday with our family, please watch this short
recap:

Kasich For America Contest Rules

Contest ends April 17, 2016
at 11:59pm EDT.
Limit one entry per
individual.
A donation of $10 or more
will automatically enter you in the contest.
You can enter without making
a contribution by clicking here.
Entering this Promotion by
making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of
winning.
Void where prohibited.

See full terms & conditions
below.
NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR
WIN THIS PROMOTION. No contribution of any kind is necessary to
enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not
increase your chances or odds of winning. Odds of winning depend
on the number of entries received. Only individuals who are
legally permitted to make contributions to Kasich For America may
enter by making a contribution.

Void where prohibited.

Entrants agree to be bound by
these Rules and by the decisions of the Sponsor, which are final
and binding in all respects. To be eligible to win the prize,
entries must be completed and received by the Sponsor as
specified below. All applicable federal, state, and local laws
and regulations apply.

Please click here to enter by
making a contribution of $10.

Please click here to enter
without making a contribution. You must complete and submit the
online entry form during the contest period.

This Promotion begins on
Thursday, April 14, 2016 at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Standard Time and
ends on Sunday, April 17, 2016 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time
("Entry Period"). All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern
Standard Time on Sunday.

Five winners will receive the
following Prize: one signed copy of Gov. John Kasich's book
'Every Other Monday'.

This Promotion is open to
citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the
United States who are at least 18 years of age or the age of
majority as determined by state law. Prize may not be substituted
or exchanged and is not redeemable for cash. All federal, state,
and local taxes associated with the receipt or use of any prize
awarded are the sole responsibility of the winner.

The winner of this Promotion will
be notified on or before Monday, April 18, 2016. Unless otherwise
prohibited by applicable law, submitting an entry or accepting
the Prize in this Promotion constitutes the entrant's permission
to use his or her name, hometown, likeness, and/or prize
information, without limitation, for promotional purposes without
further permission or compensation. As a condition of being
awarded the Prize, the winner may be required to executive and
deliver to Sponsor a signed affidavit of eligibility and
acceptance of these Terms & Conditions and release of liability,
and any other legal, regulatory, or tax-related documents as
required by the Sponsor.

The Sponsor of this Promotion is
Kasich For America, Post Office Box 1344, Columbus, Ohio 43216.

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

name: Jordyn Rush
subject: Take our pledge: Support women candidates
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7098987908383637504/-1495171986542821376?refcode=e20160415&refcode2=e20160415&amount=25)
---
**PLEDGED TO SUPPORT WOMEN CANDIDATES?
Name:
Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
**[Signature: PENDING](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7098987908383637504/-1423114392504893440)****

Dear Friend,

I've always wanted to work in politics, but as a young girl, it wasn't exactly easy to find female role models. I knew of a few famous women politicians, but when I turned on the nightly news with my parents, most of the people I saw, from the president all the way down to my state legislator, were men.

Over the past few years, that has slowly started to change. We've seen incredible women like Patty Murray, Barbara Boxer, Hillary Clinton, and so many others rise to leadership positions that would have seemed impossible just a few decades ago.

But it's 2016 and women _still_ make up less than 20% of Congress. Clearly, we have a long way to go. **[Will you commit to electing more women to Congress so that together, we can change the face of our government? We need to lend our voices today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7098987908383637504/-1423114392504893440)**

This problem is huge and it's complicated, but here's the simplified version: **When more women run, more women win, and our government better represents our diverse country.**

We've got a lot of work to do as a country before we reach a place of equality, and that journey starts with Democrats like you pledging to support women candidates like Katie who are running for offices up and down the ticket.

**[So please, add your name today to let women candidates know that you have their back.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7098987908383637504/-1423114392504893440)**

Sincerely,

Jordyn Rush
Deputy Campaign Manager
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7098987908383637504/-1495171986542821376?refcode=e20160415&refcode2=e20160415&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7098987908383637504/-1567229580580749312).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

subject: We're tied

body:
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/34817976:sLh1VeCIN:m:1:1155937413:03150B6BC6644F6696AA1E923A3D018C:r)

Peter, a new Fox News poll released last night shows major positive movement in our direction. Support for our campaign has jumped 8-points just since last month while Senator Cruz has plummeted a full 11-points. **That means Senator Cruz and I are essentially tied for second place.**

[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/34817976:sLh1VeCIN:m:1:1155937413:03150B6BC6644F6696AA1E923A3D018C:r)

**As you can see, our positive message is working as more people hear it.**

It's critical that we continue gathering delegates to stop Trump _**[and head into the convention with the wind at our backs!](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/34817976:sLh1VeCIN:m:1:1155937413:03150B6BC6644F6696AA1E923A3D018C:r)**_

The New York Primary is on Tuesday, followed by five more primaries a week later.

_**[Chip in $25 or more today to help with our Get-Out-The-Vote programs!](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/34817977:sLh1VeCIN:m:1:1155937413:03150B6BC6644F6696AA1E923A3D018C:r)**_

**_[> > CHIP IN $25 <<](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/34817977:sLh1VeCIN:m:1:1155937413:03150B6BC6644F6696AA1E923A3D018C:r)_**

_**[> > CHIP IN $50 <<](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/34817976:sLh1VeCIN:m:1:1155937413:03150B6BC6644F6696AA1E923A3D018C:r)**_

_**[> > CHIP IN $100 <<](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/34817978:sLh1VeCIN:m:1:1155937413:03150B6BC6644F6696AA1E923A3D018C:r)**_

There have also now been 14 polls in a row showing that if Republicans select me as their nominee, I will defeat Hillary Clinton in the fall. Not only would she crush Trump/Cruz, **but they'd lose so bad it'd jeopardize our majority in the U.S. Senate and in dozens of statewide elections!**

Our positive message is working and **_[it's vital that we keep marching forward to the convention.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/34817976:sLh1VeCIN:m:1:1155937413:03150B6BC6644F6696AA1E923A3D018C:r)_** Thank you for your support!

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: You and me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
New York's primary: | Friend --

With New York's primary coming up on Tuesday, last night's debate may have been my last chance to talk with voters here before they head to the polls.

I’ve been fighting my heart out to win over every last voter -- I hope I can count on you to be by my side as we close this out.

**All it takes is one contribution today to show me you’re with me and ready to win this nomination (and the campaign will send you a sticker to say thanks):** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUyNDU2OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzQwMTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUyNDU2OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzQwMTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Hillary

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUyNDU2OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzQwMTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUyNDU2OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzQwMTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjUyNDU2OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzQwMTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjUyNDU2OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzQwMTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjUyNDU2OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzQwMTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUyNDU2OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzQwMTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUyNDU2OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzQwMTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjUyNDU2OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzQwMTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUyNDU2OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzQwMTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUyNDU2OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzQwMTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUyNDU2OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzQwMTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUyNDU2OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyMzQwMTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

subject: Update on the $100,000 by Tuesday!
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719968/3476a20e/d822cc4/274200f3/2924754533/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, You've shown enormous support for Joe over the past many months, and because of that support, we will defeat the outside special interest money being funneled into this race for our opponent. But to do so, we must continue closing in on our goal of raising $100,000 to put directly into buying TV time - by this Tuesday. Early each morning, our team recalculates our numbers, and [after yesterday's donations, we only need _**12 more people from Cresco to contribute**_ for us to meet the $100,000 goal.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719968/3476a20e/d822cc4/274200f2/2924754533/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0415FBEOP2p1&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700") | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719968/3476a20e/d822cc4/274200f1/2924754533/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0415FBEOP2b1&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")

name: Mike Mikus
subject: Dead heat race (polling update)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4510261448064106496/-7259216559623634944?refcode=e20160415.2&refcode2=e20160415.2nd&amount=25)
---
Just hopped off the phone with our pollster, friend, and had to share the news:

**Our latest polling shows that Katie 's primary race is now in a dead heat.** With just a week and a half until the election, we've never been closer to victory.

[**If you 've been waiting for the right time to make your first donation, THIS IS IT! Help Katie seize the momentum and leap ahead of her primary opponent: Every dollars counts!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4510261448064106496/-7259216559623634944?refcode=e20160415.2&refcode2=e20160415.2nd&amount=25)

Nine months ago, no one expected we'd put up such a fight and bring this race to razor-thin margins. But here we are -- with thousands of grassroots donors, backed by prominent leaders and advocacy groups, and in a dead-heat race with an opponent who had six years to build his campaign.

**Katie needs us to fight together now and pull ahead --[make a donation right now to fund our media response plan and help Katie reach out to undecided voters and win on Primary Day.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4510261448064106496/-7259216559623634944?refcode=e20160415.2&refcode2=e20160415.2nd&amount=25)**

Thank you!

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4510261448064106496/-7259216559623634944?refcode=e20160415.2&refcode2=e20160415.2nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4510261448064106496/-7331274153661562880).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: [PHOTO] Our political revolution in NYC
body:
#
We had one of the most incredible moments of our campaign on Wednesday night. More than 27,000 people came out for our rally in New York City - it was HUGE.
This is what a political revolution looks like. This is the momentum we need going into New York's primary on Tuesday. **Let's make sure we win.**
[**If everyone who has signed up to support our campaign made a $2.70 contribution right now, it would ensure we have the resources we need to win New York 's primary on Tuesday night. Make yours here.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-york-rally?refcode=em160415-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-york-rally?refcode=em160415-full")
[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-york-rally?refcode=em160415-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-york-rally?refcode=em160415-full")
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-york-rally?refcode=em160415-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-york-rally?refcode=em160415-full")**
If we stand together now, we can win the Democratic nomination and the White House. Let's go.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Joe Sestak
subject: That's my Democratic party :)
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171996c/3476a20e/d82b2d5/27420163/795771792/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, Wow...Washington DC power brokers really want to own "their" PA Senate seat for the purchase price of almost $4 million! The Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) and another outside special interest group have just added over $600K to the $3.2 million they already put into the race, and with expanded false attack ads! That's my Democratic party! :) **Peter, believe it or not, we are still up in the polls, holding back the tidal wave of money that they are rushing into this race. I know your contributions may seem like a small ripple against that wave, but your ripples are the bulwark that ****are****adding up to buoy us to victory in just 11 days!** [Please add your ripple today - $5, $10, $15, $25, or $40 - or the most you can do, today!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171996c/3476a20e/d82b2d5/27420162/795771792/VEsE/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0415FB2p1&amounts=5,10,25,40,80,100,250") | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171996c/3476a20e/d82b2d5/27420161/795771792/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0415FB2b1&amounts=5,10,25,40,80,100,250")

Joe

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: more division
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|

> Friend,
>
> Yesterday's headline in the Baltimore Sun summed up what we have been up against in this campaign -"Donor, Hedge Fund Manager Behind Attack Ads on Chris Van Hollen".
>
> We are facing the worst type of electoral politics -- outrageous false attacks funded by Wall Street money trying to spread fear, division, and untruths in an attempt to move voters just as they are heading to cast their ballots.
>
> [**We need your help to make sure these efforts don 't succeed!**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d54/70cdc2ba/47ddf5b2/396fb9e/3946588160/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-breakingnews?refcode=em41516_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+need+your+help+to+make+sure+these+eff&utm_campaign=em41516_1&source=em41516_1") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Chip in $15](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d54/70cdc2ba/47ddf5b2/396fb9f/3946588160/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-breakingnews?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em41516_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+15&utm_campaign=em41516_1&source=em41516_1")** **[Chip in $25](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d54/70cdc2ba/47ddf5b2/396fb9c/3946588160/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-breakingnews?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em41516_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25&utm_campaign=em41516_1&source=em41516_1")** **[Chip in $50](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d54/70cdc2ba/47ddf5b2/396fb9d/3946588160/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-breakingnews?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em41516_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+50&utm_campaign=em41516_1&source=em41516_1")** **[Chip in $100](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d54/70cdc2ba/47ddf5b2/396fb9a/3946588160/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-breakingnews?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em41516_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Chip+in+100&utm_campaign=em41516_1&source=em41516_1")** **[Chip in $250](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d54/70cdc2ba/47ddf5b2/396fb9b/3946588160/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-breakingnews?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em41516_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Chip+in+250&utm_campaign=em41516_1&source=em41516_1")** **[Or, donate another amount](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d54/70cdc2ba/47ddf5b2/396fb98/3946588160/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-breakingnews?refcode=em41316_2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em41516_1&source=em41516_1")** I've spent my entire public life fighting for campaign reform and against dark money in our elections and this is why. Instead of running on issues our opponent is trying to poison the electorate with lies with the help of two big money powered SuperPACS.
>
> We have to fight back. We can't let these tactics win.
>
> Across Maryland early voting has already begun and voters are heading to the polls. I want to ensure that they know the truth about my record and are clear about the stakes and choice in this election.
>
> [**To get the word out during these final days of the campaign we 'll need your continuing support, friend. Will you help with whatever you can before midnight tonight?**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d54/70cdc2ba/47ddf5b2/396fb99/3946588160/VEsO/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-breakingnews?refcode=em41516_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=8+-+To+get+the+word+out+during+these+final+d&utm_campaign=em41516_1&source=em41516_1")
>
> Thank you for everything,
>
> Chris
>
> | ****[DONATE](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d54/70cdc2ba/47ddf5b2/396fb96/3946588160/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-breakingnews?refcode=em41516_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=9+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em41516_1&source=em41516_1")****
> ---
>
>

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d54/70cdc2ba/47ddf5b2/396fb97/3946588160/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=10+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em41516_1&source=em41516_1") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Last night’s debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
Let's go win. | Friend --

After last night’s debate, Bernie told reporters he thinks he’ll win the nomination because his team is more enthusiastic than ours.

He’s talking about you.

Should we show him just how enthusiastic we are about making Hillary our next president?

**Chip in $1 right now, and let’s go win the New York primary on Tuesday:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUyNTM4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDQ5Njc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUyNTM4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDQ5Njc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUyNTM4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDQ5Njc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUyNTM4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDQ5Njc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjUyNTM4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDQ5Njc3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjUyNTM4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDQ5Njc3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjUyNTM4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDQ5Njc3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUyNTM4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDQ5Njc3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUyNTM4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDQ5Njc3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjUyNTM4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDQ5Njc3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUyNTM4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDQ5Njc3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUyNTM4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDQ5Njc3S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUyNTM4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDQ5Njc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUyNTM4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNDQ5Njc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Fwd: Special interest groups' TV ads now just shy of $4 million!
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719967/3476a20e/d8350b6/27420655/2809073168/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, Wow...Washington DC power brokers really want to own "their" PA Senate seat for the purchase price of almost $4 million! The Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) and another outside special interest group have just added over $600K to the $3.2 million they already put into the race, and with expanded false attack ads! That's my Democratic party! :) **Peter, believe it or not, we are still up in the polls, holding back the tidal wave of money that they are rushing into this race. I know your contributions may seem like a small ripple against that wave, but your ripples are the bulwark that ****are****adding up to buoy us to victory in just 11 days!** [Please add your ripple today - $5, $10, $15, $25, or $40 - or the most you can do, today!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719967/3476a20e/d8350b6/27420654/2809073168/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0415FB3p1&amounts=5,10,25,40,80,100,250") | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719967/3476a20e/d8350b6/27420653/2809073168/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0415FB3b1&amounts=5,10,25,40,80,100,250")
---
Warmly,

Joe

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719967/3476a20e/d8350b6/27420652/2809073168/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[
](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719967/3476a20e/d8350b6/27420651/2809073168/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=Footer")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719967/3476a20e/d8350b6/27420650/2809073168/VEsA/ "http://joesestak.com/") |
---|---|---
| Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Tonight: George Clooney ($353,000)
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Tonight Hillary Clinton is hosting a fundraiser at the home of a California venture capitalist where couples contributing $353,000 get to sit at a table with George Clooney.
Now, you know where this campaign stands on George Clooney. YUGE fans. **But a political contribution of $353,000?!??! That 's just an obscene amount of money.**
And while the Clinton campaign repeatedly claims this money to her "Victory Fund" goes toward supporting the DNC, campaign finance records show they've spent millions of those dollars to subsidize their own campaign. It is, let's just say, _a very creative way_ to use enormous checks from people like Alice Walton (yes, Wal-Mart) to cover what would otherwise be campaign expenses.
So, we've set another ambitious goal, because that's what this campaign is about: setting ambitious goals and watching people come together to meet them. Here it is:
[**Help Bernie raise $353,000 before midnight. Not in a single check, but in $3.53 increments. Add your contribution to the thousands being made right now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/353400?refcode=em160415-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/353400?refcode=em160415-full")
New York votes in just four days, and we have a chance to shock the world right in Hillary Clinton's backyard. Over 19,000 people came to see Bernie at a rally in the Bronx. Then 27,000 joined him at Washington Square Park. And last night chants of Bernie! Bernie! Bernie! echoed through the debate venue after Bernie's closing remarks. **We can do this. Maybe not in $353,000 chunks, but $3.53 at a time.**
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/353400?refcode=em160415-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/353400?refcode=em160415-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
